prompt: design a cohort retention heatmap showing user engagement rates over 12 months for different customer acquisition channels
prompt_refined: Generate a professional data visualization: a cohort retention heatmap. This heatmap must clearly display user engagement rates across a 12-month period, segmented by distinct customer acquisition channels. Label the y-axis 'Customer Acquisition Channels' and the x-axis 'Months Since Acquisition' (from 1 to 12). The heatmap cells should use a color gradient where deep green represents high engagement and deep red represents low engagement. Include a clear title and a color legend. The overall design should be clean, modern, and easily readable.
objects: numerical labels on the X-axis (1 to 12)
color legend (deep green for high engagement, deep red for low engagement)
customer acquisition channel labels (on the Y-axis)
